description: Complete FEAT-004 from prior task: add missing tests for Tier 2-3 inference/chaining/api_sim/non_classification/certified modules that already have implementations. Also update __init__.py exports to include inference, chaining, api_sim, non_classification modules.
steps: Create tests/test_inference.py with tests for watermark_flip, prediction_poison, soft_label_manipulation functions from src/adv_lab/attacks/inference.py. Tests should verify: output tensor shapes match input, functions are callable with correct signatures, outputs are valid tensors.

Create tests/test_chaining.py with tests for PerturbationChain class, chain_attack function, and ChainState from src/adv_lab/attacks/chaining.py. Tests should verify: chain maintains state across steps, attack configs are composable, logging produces entries.

Create tests/test_api_sim.py with tests for APISimulator class, simulated_api_attack, anomaly_detection_evasion from src/adv_lab/attacks/api_sim.py. Tests should verify: rate limiting enforced, query budget tracked, confidence rounding to 2 decimals.

Create tests/test_non_classification.py with tests for object_detection_attack, segmentation_attack, regression_attack, rl_attack, recommendation_attack from src/adv_lab/attacks/non_classification.py.
Create tests/test_certified.py with tests for RandomizedSmoothing, lipschitz_eval, ibp_eval, find_certificate_boundary from src/adv_lab/eval/certified.py.
Update src/adv_lab/attacks/__init__.py to add imports from inference, chaining, api_sim, non_classification modules.
Update src/adv_lab/eval/__init__.py to add imports from certified module.
Verify all files pass AST validation.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 test files exist and pass AST validation
Tests follow existing patterns from tests/conftest.py (use correct_batch, lab fixtures)
Updated __init__.py files export all public functions from new modules
verification: Run AST validation on all .py files in src/ and tests/
Verify __init__.py imports are consistent with module contents
